blockingIssues.description: Object.keys() is missing from the extraction. The feature's expectedBehavior states 'Object.keys() extracted' but the extracted content only covers Object.assign() without any mention of Object.keys(). This is required per VAL-CHEAT-007.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance on handling discrepancies when feature descriptions don't match validation assertions. Example: the feature extract-internet-html-basics lists specific topics but VAL-CHEAT-002 references 'forms' which is not in the feature description. Workers should clarify with orchestrator or add a note when assertions exceed feature scope.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature extract-internet-html-basics description lists 'document structure, semantic elements, meta tags, links, images, lists' but VAL-CHEAT-002 says 'forms' is expected. Forms appear only in the validation contract, not the feature description.

reRunNote: Fix feature fix-js-objects-extraction was created after round 1 but remains pending. The blocking issue persists. No new reviews spawned since fix is not yet complete.
